metadata.name: Handle a Damaged Container at the Gate

description: A truck arrives to drop off an export container, but the gate inspection camera identifies significant damage.

nodes.task_description: The gate system flags the container with a 'Damage Exception' based on the OCR/camera inspection.

expected_outcome.expected: Clerk receives an alert with photos showing a large hole in the container wall.

nodes.task_description: Deny entry to the container and inform the driver of the damage.

expected_outcome.expected: The clerk explains that the container cannot be accepted in its current condition.

nodes.task_description: Log the incident and instruct the driver to move to a holding area to await instructions from the cargo owner.

expected_outcome.expected: The event is logged, and the driver is directed out of the main traffic flow.
